@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(skew30_boundary_refresh_loop)
C: auth_mw ∧ expMs<nowMs⇒401
H: allow_skew30_only
P: expMs≥nowMs-30s → 200
V: edge(-30s_200) ∧ edge(-31s_401)
R: ! refresh_loop
A: min_fix ∧ reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(skew30_boundary_refresh_loop).
Constraints: auth middleware and expMs<nowMs implies 401.
Hypothesis: allow_skew30_only.
Plan: expMs≥nowMs-30s then 200.
Verify: edge(-30s_200) and edge(-31s_401).
Risk: high-risk refresh_loop.
Answer target: min_fix and reg_test.
